title: Use batch processing in JDBC
description: Batch processing in JDBC improves performance by reducing the number of database round-trips. Avoid executing multiple single SQL statements in a loop; instead, add statements to a batch and execute them together. This makes code more efficient and easier to maintain.
recommendation: Refactor code to use JDBC batch processing for repeated SQL operations instead of executing statements one by one.

checks.message: Use batch processing for repeated SQL operations instead of executing statements one by one.
